heading: Norah Head vs Nords Wharf — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Norah Head, New South Wales and Nords Wharf, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nords Wharf has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Norah Head (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Norah Head or Nords Wharf safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Norah Head has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Nords Wharf scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Norah Head scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Nords Wharf scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Norah Head or Nords Wharf?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nords Wharf has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
